notes: Beta build 2026.07.22-386 — 🪤 Add a trailing stop to shares you already own. Every holding now has a 🪤 Trail button next to 🎯 Target and 🛑 Stop: tap it, type a % (blank removes it), and that share trails — the stop rises with the price and never falls. Per holding, so you pick only the ones you want. Practice money only. Feedback via the ✉ link, top-left.
